code:
---
config:
  theme: neo
  layout: dagre
---
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  classDef draftC fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef publicC fill:#bbf8c0,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef unlistedC fill:#f9f7ae,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef privateC fill:#ddd6f3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef withdrawnC fill:#fcbbbb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> draft
  draft --> public:Publish
  draft --> unlisted:Link only
  public --> unlisted:Unlist
  unlisted --> public:List
  public --> private:Hide(HealthTech_PatientRecords)
  unlisted --> private:Hide(HealthTech_PatientRecords)
  private --> public:Re-publish
  private --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  public --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  unlisted --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  withdrawn --> public:Restore(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
  withdrawn --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
  draft:Draft
  public:Public
  unlisted:Unlisted
  private:Private
  withdrawn:Withdrawn
  note right of draft : Drafts are only visible to editors.
  note right of public : Public posts are listed and discoverable.
  note right of unlisted : Unlisted posts are shared by URL only.
  note right of private : Private posts are hidden from everyone.
  note right of withdrawn : Withdrawn posts are removed from public view.
  class draft draftC
  class public publicC
  class unlisted unlistedC
  class private privateC
  class withdrawn withdrawnC

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech EMR系统设计一个内容发布状态流转图。核心是从EMR同步节点开始，经过Draft、Public、Unlisted、Private这几个主要状态，最后要能撤回到HIPAA Vault。每个状态要有不同的视觉样式区分。
明白了。方向设为从左到右（LR）。我理解为：Draft是编辑者可见的草稿态；Public是公开可发现；Unlisted是仅URL分享；Private是对PatientRecords隐藏。Withdrawn是最终撤回态，可以Restore回Public或进入Vault。对吗？
对，但Private的触发条件要明确——是从Public或Unlisted执行Hide操作，针对HealthTech_PatientRecords这个敏感数据场景。另外Withdrawn可以从任意公开状态进入。
好的，我先把主干状态流转画出来：EMR_Sync指向Draft作为起点；Draft可以Publish到Public，或者Link only到Unlisted；Public和Unlisted之间可以互相切换List/Unlist；两者都能Hide进入Private；Private可以Re-publish回Public，也可以Withdraw。
Withdrawn的处理需要补充：Withdrawn状态可以通过Restore操作回到Public，这里要关联HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault的恢复机制。另外Withdrawn也可以直接进入Vault作为终点。

已添加Withdrawn的流转：从Public、Unlisted、Private都能Withdraw进入Withdrawn；Withdrawn可以Restore(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)回到Public，或者直接流向HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。现在设置五个classDef样式：Draft用粉色（#f9f），Public用绿色（#bbf8c0），Unlisted用黄色（#f9f7ae），Private用紫色（#ddd6f3），Withdrawn用红色（#fcbbbb）。
样式没问题，但需要在每个状态右侧加上说明文字。比如Draft要注明"仅编辑者可见"，Private要强调"对所有人隐藏"，这些note能帮助理解权限差异。

已添加五条note：Draft右侧说明"Drafts are only visible to editors"；Public说明"listed and discoverable"；Unlisted说明"shared by URL only"；Private说明"hidden from everyone"；Withdrawn说明"removed from public view"。最后把class样式应用到对应状态节点上。
完整了。状态流转覆盖了EMR内容从创建、多级发布、隐私保护到合规撤回的全生命周期，HIPAA Vault作为最终归档也体现出来了。视觉上颜色区分清晰，note说明到位。
